name: Telemark (Norway, 1970–2019)
description: A gold field charged with a black Telemark battle-axe head, blade to the hoist.
history: Granted to Telemark county on 9 January 1970. The county was abolished on 1 January 2020 when it was merged with Vestfold into the new Vestfold og Telemark county; Telemark was re-established on 1 January 2024 following the dissolution of that merged entity.

features.symbolism: heraldic banner of the county arms: a black Telemark axe (a traditional broad-bladed battle-axe) on a gold field
the traditional broad-bladed Telemark battle-axe, an iconic regional weapon and tool
